prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Renault 8 Gordini (Type 804) 1.6L inline-4 (engine code: 812-02)** with forged internals: Mahle 87.5mm forged pistons, Cunningham steel rods, and a billet crankshaft (85mm stroke) for a 1.8L displacement. Pair with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and a **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **SCS Performance** with a **Bosal 2.5-inch center silencer** for optimized backpressure.

Full **DTA S80 Pro standalone ECU** with **Bosch 0280155862 3.5-bar MAP sensor** and **NGK R7437-9 iridium spark plugs** (gapped at 0.028"). Custom camshafts by **Schrick** (272° intake, 280° exhaust, 11.5mm lift) with **Titanium retainers** and **Supertech valve springs** for 8,500 RPM redline. **Mocal oil cooler (OC-100)** with **Setrab 19-row core** and **Motul 300V 15W-50** oil for thermal stability.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (RN17-specific valving)** and **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro SPF0116K)** for the rear trailing arms. **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors)** up front with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **ATE Type 200 brake fluid**. **OS Giken 1.5-way LSD** with **85W-140 Motul Gear 300** for the 4-speed manual transaxle (reinforced synchros by **Quaife**).
estetica: **Rocket Bunny RB17 widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and ducktail spoiler) with **custom 3M 4847G gloss black wrap** and **GReddy rear diffuser (Type-R)**. **Hella Rallye 3000 headlights** with **Cibie Oscar LED bulbs** and **custom C-pillar-mounted amber turn signals** (VW Beetle-style).

**Recaro SRD (E30 M3-spec) seats** in **black Alcantara with red stitching** and **Sparco 6-point harnesses (ASM1000)**. **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)** with **NRG quick-release hub** and **custom Renault Gordini horn button (brass, engraved)**. **Vintage Smiths gauges (8,000 RPM tach, oil temp, boost)** in a **carbon fiber dash overlay by Status Racing**.

**BBS RS 15x8 ET20 wheels** (gold, 5x130 PCD) with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (195/50R15)** and **custom center caps (Renault Gordini script)**. **Custom aluminum fuel filler door (flush-mount, Aerocatch)** and **Pagid RSL29 brake caliper paint (Gordini blue)**. **LED taillights (Hella 2VA) with sequential turn signals** and **custom rear fog light delete (filled with carbon fiber)**.
